things.name: Salsa Dancing Lessons
things.description: World capital of salsa - take lessons at Tin Tin Deo and dance all night in the barrios

things.name: Feria de Cali (December Festival)
things.description: Cali's greatest celebration with salsa parades, concerts and the world salsa championships

things.name: San Antonio Neighbourhood
things.description: Colonial hilltop quarter with the Plazoleta and bohemian restaurants and bars

things.name: Cristo Rey Statue
things.description: 26m Christ statue on a hilltop with the best views over the valley

things.name: Museo La Tertulia
things.description: Cali's finest art museum with Colombian modern art and cinema

things.name: Zoologico de Cali
things.description: Colombia's best zoo with Andean spectacled bears and diverse Colombian wildlife

things.name: Valle del Cauca Coffee & Sugarcane
things.description: Tour Colombia's sugar and coffee heartland in the fertile Cauca Valley

things.name: Cali Cathedral & La Merced Church
things.description: Colonial churches in the historic centre

things.name: Chipichape & Unicentro Malls
things.description: Cali's elegant shopping culture - Colombia's fashion-conscious second city

things.name: Sancocho de Gallina
things.description: Cali's definitive dish - traditional chicken and vegetable stew with aji hot sauce
